mainText:
Promo: "Bank of Entitlement: Where every dollar you spend is a validation of your superiority!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this-when I strolled into the Bank of Entitlement to deposit my millions (as one does), the teller had the audacity to ask me for identification! Can you believe it? I mean, I practically own the place! I felt utterly insulted and demanded to speak with the manager. After a dramatic scene in which I threatened to take my business elsewhere, they finally relented and processed my deposit without any further inconvenience. Because let's face it, a man of my stature should never have to prove his identity to anyone. And that, my friends, is how you assert your dominance in the world of banking.
